conversation.message_text: Talentless: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/gQn
Talentless: Hey, Alessandra here! Text us back with any questions you have while shopping & don't forget to save us as a contact to get exclusive updates!

Talentless: It's time to upgrade those basics. Your 20% off code is:

 WELCOME-PCF0Sm 

 Expires in 7 days. Auto Apply & Shop Now: https://talentless.attn.tv/af-ReQKN_Rw3 .
When will you get the color grey back I the shorts
Talentless: The Men's Jersey Shorts in Steel Grey are currently in stock. You can check them out here: https://talentless.attn.tv/a_C0y6kp_1E2
When will the women's Steel gray shorts? Be back in stock in size XXX
Xxs*

Talentless: I'm sorry, I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified the second it comes back in! What do you think about this instead? - https://talentless.attn.tv/aWNk_niK1duL
Yes
It's not showing me the option to notify me when it's in stock
And those are not the correct shorts that I wanted
I want the boxing shorts
Talentless: Sorry for the inconvenience. When you select the size and color of the shorts on the page, there should be a notify me button below the out-of-stock sign. Let me know how it goes.
It's still not there
Hello???

Talentless: There's a slight delay of a few seconds before the notify me button appears. You can also try a different browser or device as some browsers have issues with e-commerce websites. But if you can't find it, I recommend checking our social media and product page frequently to find out if it becomes available again. In the meantime, is there anything else I may help you with?

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

Template used: "Shipping Policy"; last updated: 2024-03-22 16:31:21.484

FragranceNet: Thank you for the correction. Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, Ontrac or FedEx. Once shipped it will take 4-7 business days domestically and 4-15 business days internationally. Since you placed the order on Saturday, it means that the processing time started to count on Monday. Rest assured that your order will be shipped within another 12 hours. If that does not happen, please feel free to reach out. Thank you for your patience.
